title: Emergency Relief & Disaster Response
subtitle: Immediate aid in crisis
description: NTHF provides immediate assistance to communities affected by conflict, natural disasters, and other crises. THF delivers customized food parcels, clean water, shelter materials, medical supplies, and essential non-food items to help families survive and recover.

title: Food Security
subtitle: Hunger Relief
description: NTHF combats hunger and malnutrition through regular food distributions and nutritional support for families. THF promotes long-term food sustainability to strengthen community resilience.

title: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH)
subtitle: Access to clean water & hygiene
description: NTHF provides safe, dignified and protective shelter and water access for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict and disasters.

title: Health
subtitle: Restoring health & medical support
description: NTHF sends shipments of medical supplies to countries in crisis ensuring families in need can access essential treatment and healthcare services.

title: Shelter
subtitle: Providing safe durable housing
description: NTHF provides safe, dignified and protective shelter for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict or disasters.

title: Child Protection & Widow Family Assistance
subtitle: Safeguarding vulnerable children
description: NTHF supports orphaned and vulnerable children with education, healthcare, nutrition and psychosocial care ensuring every child grows safely.

title: Education
subtitle: Access to learning and self-reliance
description: NTHF provides access to quality education, school supplies and vocational training opportunities to empower youth and adults.

title: Faith-based Giving
subtitle: Bringing relief & joy
description: NTHF provides seasonal support including Ramadan food baskets, Eid gifts and Qurbani meat distribution to help families celebrate important occasions.

title: Livelihoods & Women Empowerment
subtitle: Empowering communities to thrive
description: NTHF focuses on empowering vulnerable communities by helping individuals build sustainable livelihoods and economic independence.
